sections.heading: Introduction
sections.content:
Governor Information Birthday Unknown Address Unknown Marriage No Loved Gifts N/A
The Governor is the governor of the region that Pelican Town is a part of. He attends the Luau annually and tastes the local food. The Governor is also referenced in the Lobster Bisque episode of The Queen of Sauce and can appear in the Movie Theater lobby.

sections.heading: Quotes
sections.content:
The Luau Odd Years
Even Years
in the Movie Theater

rows: “What a lovely occasion... It's always a joy to visit Stardew Valley.”
“What a lovely occasion... It's always a joy to visit Stardew Valley. I must speak to the missus about purchasing a vacation home here.”
“I eagerly anticipate my visit to Stardew Valley each year. There's a palpable charm in the air!”
“It's lovely to see economic development in the valley!”
“I really must bring the missus out for soup and a movie!”
